syndicmanager_description: The centralized platform for efficient and transparent management of your union activities.
description_gestion_efficace: Centralize information, track memberships, and automate administrative tasks.
description_collaboration_simplifiee: Facilitate communication and document sharing between members and offices.
description_transparence_accrue: Provide full visibility into the finances, decisions, and activities of the union.

dashboard.portal_description: Here is your central portal for all your union activities.

landing_page.gérerSyndicats: Manage your unions with power and simplicity.
landing_page.syndicmanager_description: U-Gate is the all-in-one platform to organize, communicate and mobilize your members effectively.
landing_page.description_gestion_efficace: Centralize the management of your members, dues and communications.
landing_page.description_collaboration_simplifiee: Intuitive tools to foster exchanges and decision making.
landing_page.description_transparence_accrue: Ensure clear communication and secure voting for all your members.
landing_page.features_section_title: A comprehensive platform for your union
landing_page.features_section_subtitle: Discover the features that will transform the way you manage your union organization
landing_page.feature_security_desc: Secure platform with data encryption and regulatory compliance.
landing_page.feature_members_desc: Complete tools to manage memberships, dues and member profiles.
landing_page.feature_governance_desc: Electronic voting system and dashboards for modern governance.
landing_page.feature_communication_desc: Instant messaging, forums and notifications for smooth communication.
landing_page.feature_events_desc: Simplified event organization with registration management and reminders.
landing_page.feature_analytics_desc: Analytical dashboards to manage your organization with precision.
landing_page.activity_feed_subtitle: Stay informed about the latest news, events and achievements of the union community
landing_page.stats_section_subtitle: Join thousands of organizations that trust us
landing_page.popular_syndicates_subtitle: Discover the most active unions and join dynamic communities
landing_page.stay_connected_message: Stay connected and never miss important news

footer.description_plateforme: The platform for modern management of unions and associations.
